path_confusion.description: Web cache deception via path confusion -- append static extension to dynamic URL so cache stores authenticated response

probes.description: Path traversal + static extension -- backend resolves to dynamic page, cache treats as static CSS due to extension
Null byte + static extension -- backend truncates at null byte (legacy), cache keys on full path including .js
Unusual static extension (.avif, .woff2) -- CDN caches based on extension, backend ignores unknown path suffixes

delimiter_confusion.description: Web cache deception via delimiter confusion -- use semicolons, fragments, or query strings to trick cache/backend parsing

probes.description: Semicolon path parameter with .css -- Spring/Tomcat ignores semicolons, cache keys on full path as static
Fragment in path -- some reverse proxies process fragment on server side while cache uses full URL as key

normalization_discrepancy.description: Web cache deception via normalization discrepancy -- exploit differences in how cache and backend normalize paths

probes.description: Double-encoded path traversal -- cache normalizes once (keeps .woff), backend normalizes twice (resolves to dynamic page)
Dot-segment in path -- backend collapses /./  to /, cache keeps the full path and caches as .js

method_based.description: Cache deception via HTTP method -- GET request with POST parameters or HEAD request caching differences

probes.description: GET request with body containing sensitive query -- cache stores response keyed on URL only, ignoring body
